description: Unauthorized access detection rules for AWS and Azure cloud environments

rules.name: AWS Console Login Without MFA
rules.description: Detects successful AWS Management Console logins where MFA was not used. MITRE T1078.

rules.name: AWS API Call from Tor Exit Node
rules.description: Detects AWS API calls originating from known Tor exit node IP addresses. MITRE T1090.003.

rules.name: Multiple AWS Regions Accessed (Impossible Geographic Access)
rules.description: Detects the same IAM identity making API calls in 3+ AWS regions within 10 minutes — indicator of credential compromise. MITRE T1078.

rules.name: AWS Access Key Used After Long Dormancy
rules.description: Detects use of an IAM access key that has not been used in >90 days — may indicate theft of old credentials. MITRE T1078.
rules.note: Correlate with IAM credential report to find keys not used in 90+ days. Run: aws iam generate-credential-report

rules.name: Azure AD Login from Blacklisted Country
rules.description: Detects successful Azure AD logins from countries not in the approved list for this organisation. MITRE T1078.
rules.kql:
let blockedCountries = dynamic(["RU","CN","KP","IR","SY","BY"]);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| where ResultType == 0
| extend CountryCode=tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)
| where CountryCode in (blockedCountries)
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, CountryCode, IPAddress, AppDisplayName, ResultType

rules.name: Service Principal Login from External Network
rules.description: Detects service principal sign-ins from IP ranges outside Azure/trusted networks — potential service account compromise. MITRE T1078.004.
rules.kql:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| where ResultType == 0
| where UserType =~ "servicePrincipal"
| where IPAddress !startswith "10." and IPAddress !startswith "172." and IPAddress !startswith "192.168."
| where IPAddress !startswith "20." and IPAddress !startswith "40."
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName, UserType

rules.name: AWS GuardDuty Unauthorized Access Finding
rules.description: Passthrough rule for all GuardDuty UnauthorizedAccess finding types. MITRE T1078.

rules.name: Repeated Authentication Failures Followed by Success (Brute Force)
rules.description: Detects 10+ failed logins followed by a successful login within 30 minutes for the same account. MITRE T1110.
